\section{Introduction}
This is a sample document for testing the LaTeX to Markdown converter.
It includes \textbf{bold text}, \textit{italic text}, and \texttt{code text}.

\subsection{Nested Formatting}
This has \textbf{\textit{bold italic}} text.

\section{Lists}

\subsection{Bullet List}
\begin{itemize}
\item First item
\item Second item
\item Third item with \textbf{bold}
\end{itemize}

\subsection{Numbered List}
\begin{enumerate}
\item Alpha
\item Beta
\item Gamma
\end{enumerate}

\subsection{Nested List}
\begin{itemize}
\item Outer one
  \begin{itemize}
  \item Inner one
  \item Inner two
  \end{itemize}
\item Outer two
\end{itemize}

\section{Mathematics}

Inline math: $E = mc^2$ and $\alpha + \beta = \gamma$.

Display math:
\begin{equation}
\int_0^\infty e^{-x}\, dx = 1
\end{equation}

Aligned equations:
\begin{align}
a &= b + c \\
d &= e + f
\end{align}

\end{lstlisting}
